# kSecAttrPublicKeyHash

**Global Variable**

A key whose value indicates the item’s public key hash.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecAttrPublicKeyHash: CFString
```

## Discussion

The corresponding value is of type [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFData] and contains the hash of a certificate’s public key. Items of class [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecClassCertificate] have this attribute. Read only.
title: kSecAttrPublicKeyHash
